text:
The is a subterranean city beneath the innermost land of Eldia's capital city of Mitras on Paradis Island. Similar underground cities were planned for towns such as Stohess District, but were abandoned and fell into ruin.

History

At some unspecified point in time, Kenny Ackerman discovers that his sister Kuchel Ackerman has become a prostitute in a brothel located in the Underground and that one of her clients has impregnated her. Some time later, he visits Kuchel at her brothel but discovers that she had become ill and died. Her son, Levi Ackerman, is all she left behind before her passing. Kenny takes it upon himself to raise Levi in the Underground, training him in knife-wielding combat and teaching him social skills.

At some point Levi attempted to steal back a tea set Kuchel had sold in order to pay for food. He was caught in the act by the merchants, and after apprehending him, considered selling him into slavery. Levi attempted to resist and was nearly beaten to death. However, before the merchants could finish him off his Ackerman blood awakened and he killed all of them in a moment of blind rage. After calming down, he was confronted by the sole surviving merchant who attempted to blackmail Levi into sparing his life but Levi simply threw the merchant to his death.

After seeing Levi reach a point where he is able to fend for himself, Kenny abandons Levi, trusting that through his own abilities, he will some day leave the Underground. Levi later grows up to become a notorious thug in the Underground before meeting Erwin Smith, who convinces him to join the Survey Corps.

Story

The Female Titan arc

As part of the plan to capture the Female Titan in Stohess District, Armin Arlert leads Annie Leonhart, escorting Eren Yeager with Mikasa Ackerman, to a tunnel leading down into an abandoned site for another underground city. Annie refuses to enter the tunnel, alerting the Survey Corps to her deception. As she is ambushed and restrained, Annie transforms into the Female Titan, putting an end to the underground plan of the operation.

Royal Government arc

After Wall Rose was thought to have been breached, evacuated citizens of Wall Rose are sent to the Underground, with food supplies for the refugees estimated to last no more than a week. Fortunately, Wall Rose is declared safe one week after the possibility of a breach was declared. Some refugees in the Underground clash with the Military Police Brigade as they are sent back to Wall Rose, though there were no casualties on either side.

With Captain Levi's backing, Queen Historia would gather many orphans and people in need from the Underground then take them to a farm funded by the Royal Family's budget and the assets seized from politicians.
